description: Product description These squeaky crinkle crisp packet plush dog toys are great fun for your pet to play with. Featuring an internal squeaker and crinkle in each bag. Measuring 20cm x 13cm x 5cm and weighing 60g each and available in 3 fun designs. Find more great plush dog toys in the Smart Choice range. Size; 20cm x 13cm x 5cm Material; Polyester Directions Always supervise Pet when playing with toy
